pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from 24 to 21 to align with the target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JDK 24 is not available or intended for the target environment; compiling with source/target 24 would fail on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven.compiler.release property to ensure cross-compilation compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without release flag, bytecode might not be strictly compatible with JDK 21 runtime if source/target are used loosely.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the release property and add standard compiler arguments.
pom.xml.why_exists: Old configuration used source/target 17 which is incompatible with the new JDK 21 target and lacks modern compiler flags.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-javadoc-plugin configuration to use dynamic source/target properties and disable doclint.
pom.xml.why_exists: Static doclint settings might fail on stricter JDK 21 javadoc checks; dynamic properties ensure consistency with compiler target.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace maven-shade-plugin with maven-assembly-plugin for creating fat JARs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Shade plugin was removed; assembly plugin is used instead for distribution packaging.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-assembly-plugin configuration to produce a complete JAR with dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Configuration updated to match new distribution strategy replacing shade plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add SpotBugs plugin for static code analysis.
Add Maven profiles for release, development, and fast build scenarios.
Add distribution management configuration for OSSRH deployment.
Update project metadata including artifact ID, version, name, description, and URL.
pom.xml.before:
<artifactId>H2-ORM</artifactId>
<version>v0.0.1</version>
<name>h2-orm</name>
<description>Modern JPA-based database handler supporting H2, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite with advanced features</description>
<url>https://github.com/W1LDN16H7/h2-orm.git</url>
pom.xml.after:
<artifactId>h2-orm</artifactId>
<version>1.0.0</version>
<name>H2-ORM</name>
<description>Modern Spring Boot-style ORM library supporting H2, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite with advanced backup/export features</description>
<url>https://github.com/W1LDN16H7/h2-orm</url>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add inception year, licenses, developers, SCM, and issue management metadata.
Add project reporting output encoding property.
Add plugin version properties for consistent version management.
Update maven-compiler-plugin version to use property placeholder.
Add maven-surefire-plugin configuration for unit tests.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin configuration for integration tests.
Update maven-source-plugin version to use property placeholder.
Update maven-javadoc-plugin version to use property placeholder.
Update maven-assembly-plugin version to use property placeholder.
Remove old maven-surefire-plugin configuration block.
Remove old licenses, developers, and SCM metadata blocks.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.general_idea: Remove ThreadLocal EntityManager caching to adopt a per-transaction EntityManager lifecycle pattern.
src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.before: private static final ThreadLocal<EntityManager> entityManagerThreadLocal = new ThreadLocal<>();

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.general_idea: Refactor getEntityManager to create a new EntityManager instance on every call instead of retrieving from ThreadLocal.
Deprecate closeEntityManager by removing ThreadLocal cleanup logic, as EntityManagers are now short-lived.
Update executeInTransaction to manually manage EntityManager lifecycle (create, use, close) instead of relying on ThreadLocal state.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/MetadataManage.general_idea: Add a new generic utility method to retrieve entity IDs via reflection.
Add a new utility method to check if an entity is new based on its ID value.
Rename the existing isEntityNew method to isEntityNewById to avoid naming conflict with the newly added method.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SpringBootS.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package structure of the JpaRepository class.
src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SpringBootS.why_exists: Compilation error: class 'h2.orm.repository.JpaRepository' cannot be found because it has been moved to 'h2.orm.core.repository'.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SuperSimple.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the JpaRepository interface.
src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SuperSimple.why_exists: Class h2.orm.repository.JpaRepository not found; compilation error due to moved class.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Update log pattern to include the full date for better traceability.
Rename log file to reflect the new project name or technology stack.
Rename rolling log file pattern to match the new project name.
